accounts.name: milestone
docs: Milestone PDA — one per milestone per campaign

instructions.name: cancel_campaign
docs: Creator cancels a campaign with no backers and reclaims deposit

accounts.name: token_mint
docs: Token mint — authority is Campaign PDA

accounts.name: backer_token_account
docs: Backer's associated token account (created if needed)

accounts.name: campaign_vault
docs: Vault PDA — holds native SOL (backer funds + deposit)

accounts.name: token_mint
docs: SPL Token Mint for this campaign's tokens
Mint authority = Campaign PDA (so only program can mint via claim_tokens)

accounts.name: payer
docs: Anyone can execute after voting deadline

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: Only the admin wallet can perform this action

errors.name: UnauthorizedSigner
errors.msg: Only the AI agent or admin wallet can perform this action

errors.name: ProgramPaused
errors.msg: Program is paused by admin

errors.name: InvalidCampaignStatus
errors.msg: Campaign is not in the expected status

errors.name: TitleTooLong
errors.msg: Campaign title exceeds maximum length

errors.name: TooManyMilestones
errors.msg: Too many milestones (max 5)

errors.name: MilestoneAmountMismatch
errors.msg: Milestone amounts must sum to campaign goal

errors.name: MilestonesNotComplete
errors.msg: All milestones must be added before activating

errors.name: DeadlineInPast
errors.msg: Milestone deadline must be in the future

errors.name: CampaignNotActive
errors.msg: Campaign is not active for backing

errors.name: BelowMinimumBacking
errors.msg: Backing amount is below minimum (0.1 SOL)

errors.name: InvalidMilestoneStatus
errors.msg: Milestone is not in the expected status

errors.name: NotCreator
errors.msg: Only the campaign creator can perform this action

errors.name: MilestoneOutOfOrder
errors.msg: Milestones must be submitted in order

errors.name: NothingToClaim
errors.msg: No tokens available to claim

errors.name: NotABacker
errors.msg: Not a backer of this campaign

errors.name: AlreadyVoted
errors.msg: Already voted on this extension

errors.name: VotingNotEnded
errors.msg: Voting period has not ended yet

errors.name: VotingEnded
errors.msg: Voting period has already ended

errors.name: AlreadyExecuted
errors.msg: Extension result already executed

errors.name: ExtensionTooLong
errors.msg: New deadline exceeds maximum extension period

errors.name: NotRefunded
errors.msg: Campaign is not in refunded status

errors.name: AlreadyRefunded
errors.msg: Refund already claimed

errors.name: CampaignStillActive
errors.msg: Campaign is still active — cannot close

errors.name: TokensNotClaimed
errors.msg: Tokens not fully claimed — cannot close position

errors.name: RefundNotClaimed
errors.msg: Refund not claimed — cannot close position

errors.name: PositionsNotClosed
errors.msg: Not all backer positions are closed yet

errors.name: CampaignHasBackers
errors.msg: Campaign has backers — cannot cancel, use governance

errors.name: PastGraceDeadline
errors.msg: Milestone grace deadline has passed — too late to submit

errors.name: MathOverflow
errors.msg: Arithmetic overflow

fields.name: tier
docs: Tier at first backing (1, 2, or 3) — does not change on increase

fields.name: tokens_allocated
docs: Total tokens allocated (rights, not minted yet)

fields.name: milestones_claimed_through
docs: Index of last milestone claimed through (0 = none claimed)

fields.name: nonce
docs: Nonce for PDA uniqueness (creator can have multiple campaigns)

fields.name: vault_balance
docs: Current SOL balance in vault (decreases on release/refund)

fields.name: token_mint
docs: SPL Token mint address for this campaign's tokens

fields.name: tokens_per_lamport
docs: Base token rate: tokens per lamport for Tier 1 backers

fields.name: total_tokens_allocated
docs: Sum of all backer token allocations (for quorum calculation)

fields.name: milestones_count
docs: Number of milestones for this campaign (1-5)

fields.name: milestones_initialized
docs: How many milestones have been initialized via add_milestone

fields.name: milestones_approved
docs: How many milestones have been approved and released

fields.name: milestone_amounts
docs: Amount of each milestone in lamports (indexed by milestone index)
Stored here so claim_tokens doesn't need milestone accounts

fields.name: security_deposit_lamports
docs: Original security deposit in lamports (0.5% of goal)

fields.name: refund_snapshot_vault_balance
docs: Vault balance snapshot taken when entering Refunded status
Prevents race condition in concurrent claim_refund calls

fields.name: positions_closed
docs: Counter of closed backer positions (for close_campaign check)

types.name: ExtensionVote
docs: Individual vote record (one per backer per milestone)

fields.name: milestone
docs: The milestone this vote is for

fields.name: voting_power
docs: Voting power used (capped at 20% of total)

types.name: ExtensionVotingState
docs: Aggregate voting state for a milestone extension request

fields.name: milestone
docs: The milestone this vote is for

fields.name: proposed_deadline
docs: Proposed new deadline if extension wins

fields.name: executed
docs: Whether the result has been executed

fields.name: amount_lamports
docs: SOL amount for this milestone in lamports

fields.name: evidence_content_hash
docs: SHA-256 hash of evidence content (computed client-side)

fields.name: ai_decision_hash
docs: SHA-256 hash of full Claude response (for audit trail)

fields.name: admin_wallet
docs: Admin wallet — can pause, override decisions, manage config

fields.name: ai_agent_wallet
docs: AI agent wallet — signs release_milestone transactions
